labacts.name: Collatz Sequence
labacts.description: Computes all terms of the Collatz sequence from a positive odd integer. Applies 3n+1 for odd terms and n/2 for even terms until reaching 1.

labacts.name: Division Algorithm
labacts.description: Expresses integer division as m = n(q) + r, identifying the dividend, divisor, quotient, and remainder.

labacts.name: Euclidean GCD
labacts.description: Finds the Greatest Common Divisor (GCD) and Least Common Multiple (LCM) of two positive integers using the Euclidean algorithm.

labacts.name: Palindrome Checker
labacts.description: Checks whether a string reads the same forwards and backwards, ignoring spaces and letter case.

labacts.name: Fibonacci
labacts.description: Generates the Fibonacci sequence for a given number of terms. Seed values: F(0)=0, F(1)=1. Input must be greater than 2.

labacts.name: Lucas
labacts.description: Generates the Lucas number sequence for a given number of terms. Seed values: L(0)=2, L(1)=1. Input must be greater than 2.

labacts.name: Tribonacci
labacts.description: Generates the Tribonacci sequence for a given number of terms. Seed values: T(0)=0, T(1)=0, T(2)=1. Input must be greater than 3.
